summary: Iteration 35 - OTP Registration Bug Fix Testing Complete. Bug fix verified: OTP is now sent during registration (in /register endpoint) instead of requiring a separate call. All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Registration redirects to /verification?email=...&sent=1, verification page does NOT auto-send OTP when sent=1, Matrix.png logo displays on all auth pages.

backend.Rate limiting send-otp: PASS - Rate limit applied after 5 requests

frontend.Registration form submission: PASS - Creates account and redirects to /verification?email=...&sent=1
frontend.Verification page with sent=1: PASS - Does NOT auto-send OTP (0 send-otp calls)
frontend.Login with pending_verification account: PASS - Returns 403 and redirects to verification
frontend.60s cooldown timer: PASS - Displayed correctly on verification page
frontend.OTP input fields: PASS - 6 digit inputs with data-testid attributes

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: /register endpoint now sends OTP directly (lines 167-185 in auth.py)
RegisterPage.js correctly passes &sent=1 in redirect URL when otp_sent=true
VerifyOTPPage.js correctly skips auto-send when sent=1 (alreadySent check)
Matrix.png logo correctly used on all 3 auth pages (inscription, connexion, verification)
Rate limiting implemented: 5 send-otp per minute, 10 verify-otp per minute
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP registration bug fix verified. Key changes: 1) /register endpoint sends OTP directly (returns otp_sent:true). 2) RegisterPage.js passes &sent=1 to verification URL. 3) VerifyOTPPage.js skips auto-send if sent=1. 4) Matrix.png logo on all auth pages. Routes: /inscription, /connexion, /verification?email=...&sent=1. Email sending via Resend API is working.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB storage and Resend email sending
